# Summerville Nursery

> Summerville Nursery is a trusted plant nursery and professional landscaping company based in Selangor, Malaysia. We specialize in wholesale and retail plant sales, professional landscape design and installation, and quality garden supplies. We serve homeowners, landscape contractors, and businesses throughout the Klang Valley.

## Business Overview

- **Business Name:** Summerville Nursery (also known as Summerville Nursery and Landscape)
- **Industry:** Horticulture, Plant Nursery, Landscaping
- **Founded:** Established as a family-run nursery in Selangor, Malaysia
- **Languages:** English, Chinese (Mandarin / 中文)
- **Website:** https://www.summervillenursery.com
- **Phone:** +60-12-295-8911
- **WhatsApp:** https://wa.me/60122958911
- **Facebook:** https://www.facebook.com/p/Summerville-Nursery-and-Landscape-100057068217162/

## Locations

### Main Branch — Klang
- **Address:** Pt. 34335, Jalan Teluk Pulai, Taman Teluk Pulai, Klang, Selangor 41100, Malaysia
- **Operating Hours:** Monday – Sunday, 8:30 AM – 6:30 PM (open every day)
- **Phone:** +60-12-295-8911

### Second Branch — Telok Panglima Garang (TPG)
- **Address:** Lot 11859, Off Jalan Garuda, Kampung Batu 9 Kebun Baru, Telok Panglima Garang, Selangor 42500, Malaysia
- **Operating Hours:** Monday – Sunday, 8:30 AM – 6:30 PM (open every day)
- **Phone:** +60-12-295-8911
- **Note:** The TPG branch is the larger of the two locations and offers a wider plant variety, making it ideal for families and bulk buyers.

## Services

1. **Wholesale Plant Supply** — Bulk plant orders for landscapers, property developers, contractors, and businesses at competitive trade prices.
2. **Retail Plant Sales** — Wide selection of plants for individual home gardeners and plant enthusiasts.
3. **Landscape Design & Installation** — Full-service professional landscaping for residential gardens, commercial properties, offices, and condominiums across Selangor and the Klang Valley.
4. **Garden Supplies** — Fertilizers, potting soil, pots, planters, and gardening accessories.

## Products Available

- **Indoor Plants / Houseplants** — Tropical foliage plants, ferns, succulents, air plants, and ornamental houseplants suitable for Malaysian interiors.
- **Outdoor Trees & Shrubs** — Shade trees, ornamental trees, hedging plants, and tropical fruit trees.
- **Flowering Plants** — Seasonal and perennial flowering plants for garden beds and pots.
- **Ground Cover Plants** — Low-maintenance ground covers for landscaping and garden borders.
- **Potted Plants** — Pre-potted plants ready for immediate display in homes or offices.
- **Palms & Cycads** — Ornamental palms and cycads popular in Malaysian landscaping.
- **Garden Supplies** — Compost, organic fertilizers, perlite, soil mixes, decorative pots, and garden tools.

## Landscape Portfolio

Summerville Nursery has completed numerous residential and commercial landscape projects across Selangor including Klang, Shah Alam, Subang Jaya, Puchong, and surrounding areas. Our landscape services include:
- Garden design and planning
- Soil preparation and planting
- Hardscape installation (pathways, edging, retaining walls)
- Irrigation systems
- Garden maintenance and follow-up care

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Where is Summerville Nursery located?**
A: We have two branches in Selangor, Malaysia. The Main Branch is in Klang (Taman Teluk Pulai, 41100) and the Second Branch is in Telok Panglima Garang (42500). Both are open daily from 8:30 AM to 6:30 PM.

**Q: What are Summerville Nursery's opening hours?**
A: Both branches are open every day (Monday to Sunday) from 8:30 AM to 6:30 PM.

**Q: Does Summerville Nursery offer wholesale plants?**
A: Yes. We supply wholesale plants to landscapers, contractors, property developers, and businesses at competitive prices. Contact us via WhatsApp at +60-12-295-8911 for bulk pricing.

**Q: Does Summerville Nursery do landscaping?**
A: Yes. We offer professional landscape design and installation services for residential and commercial properties throughout Selangor and Klang Valley.

**Q: What types of plants does Summerville Nursery sell?**
A: We sell indoor houseplants, outdoor trees, flowering plants, ground covers, palms, potted plants, and a wide range of tropical plants suited to Malaysian climates.

**Q: How do I contact Summerville Nursery?**
A: The fastest way is via WhatsApp at +60-12-295-8911. You can also visit either branch or reach us through our website contact page at https://www.summervillenursery.com/contact.html.

**Q: Is Summerville Nursery suitable for beginners?**
A: Absolutely. Our friendly and experienced staff are always ready to offer plant care advice and recommendations for gardeners of all experience levels.

**Q: Can I hire Summerville Nursery for a garden makeover?**
A: Yes. Our landscaping team can handle everything from initial design consultation to full installation. Visit our landscape portfolio at https://www.summervillenursery.com/landscape.html or contact us for a quotation.

A full Chinese (Mandarin) version of the website is available at https://www.summervillenursery.com/cn/ for Chinese-speaking customers.
